block_00: CFD positions ki overnight fees main badlao
block_02: Hum apko CFD position ki overnight fee main important anay waly badlaoo say agaah karna chahte hain . 9 July 2020 say shuru hotay hoey, overnight fees ub trading account balance say kati jaie ge. Overnight fees ub investment say nahi kati jaie ge.
block_03: Krpaya dehaan dain kay yhe badlaoo new aur Purani dono CFD positions dono pay lagu hu ga jo ka 9 July 2020 tak khuli hain.
block_04: Agar app ka koi bhi sawal hay tu app humain kisi bhi samay support@iqoption.com pay sampark kar sakty hain.
block_05: IQOPTION platform ko chunanay kay kiye dhanyvaad.
